{{Quote|Take ''Mon Adapyne'' and ''Elegos A'Kla'' and rally with the Second Fleet at Muscave. I realize I'm placing your battle group in harm's way by sending you directly into the Coruscant system, but our objective is to accomplish the reverse of what we did at Mon Calamari, by drawing the enemy into engagements at outer-system worlds.|[[Traest Kre'fey]], to [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="TUF">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>}}
'''Muscave''' was one of two [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giants]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]]. During the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance's]] [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Second Fleet]] engaged elements of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|armada]] above Muscave.

{{Planet-stub}}
